description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Emscripten that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: build-win10, build-linux, and build-macos, each running on a different environment (windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macos-latest respectively). For each job, clone the repository, download and configure Ninja and Emscripten SDK, configure CMake, and then build the project using cmake --build . The build-linux and build-win10 jobs should run with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release configurations, while the build-macos job should only run for Debug configuration.
